title: Additional Mouse Settings [AMS]
description: Adds additional mouse settings as "mouse acceleration,  mouse smoothing, angle snapping" etc.
body:
Enhances your Minecraft aim and camera control with advanced mouse parameters. This mod provides a comprehensive suite of settings that the vanilla game lacks, allowing you to fine-tune your movement to perfection.

Key Features:
- Independent X/Y Sensitivity: Adjust horizontal and vertical sensitivity separately for better precision.
- Advanced Mouse Acceleration: Take full control with customizable acceleration strength, threshold, and curves.
- Angle snapping: Assist your aim by snapping movement to the X or Y axis for perfectly straight camera pans.
- Smoothing: Makes your camera feel smoother
